ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state (e.g., ACT, NSW) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is collected */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active participants */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered participants */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of participant deaths */,
  "incident_rate" TEXT /* Incident rate of participants (per 100,000 people) */,
  "prevalence_rate" TEXT /* Prevalence rate of participants (per 100,000 people) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data is collected */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active workers */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered workers */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of worker deaths */,
  "burnout_rate" TEXT /* Burnout rate of workers (per 100 people) */,
  "job_satisfaction_rate" TEXT /* Job satisfaction rate of workers (per 100 people) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated participant record */,
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated worker record */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  " metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the health metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_worker_id FOREIGN KEY ("worker_id") REFERENCES workers ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the role (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the intervention is implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the intervention */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action was performed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health metric */,
  "dataCompleteness" TEXT /* Data completeness percentage */,
  "dataConsistency" TEXT /* Data consistency percentage */,
  "dataAccuracy" TEXT /* Data accuracy percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES health_metrics ("metric_id")
)
